banner.title: Junior High School (Grades 7-10)
banner.subtitle: Building a strong foundation through cultural integration and academic excellence.

intro.title: JHS Educational Approach
intro.description: Our Junior High School program follows the MATATAG Curriculum, specifically localized for our Blaan learners. We focus on core competencies while ensuring students remain connected to their roots.

cards.title: Core Subjects & Programs
cards.description: Comprehensive education including English, Math, Science, Filipino, Araling Panlipunan, and Values Education, MAPEH, & TLE with beadwork and jewelry craftsmanship.

cards.title: Bridging Programs
cards.description: Specialized "Catch-Up" support focusing on literacy, numeracy, and reading. We ensure no student is left behind through personalized academic interventions.

cards.title: Student Clubs & Interests
cards.description: Beyond academics, we offer various clubs and extracurricular activities to help students discover their passions, build leadership skills, and find their unique interests.
